entries.title: Harden frontend readiness contract and diagnostics
summary: Finalizes frontend-facing API contract readiness before minimal frontend work.
Adds or hardens runtime smoke tests, typed frontend API boundary checks, diagnostics, and generated contract verification.
Starts the machine-readable project changelog.

entries.title: Start codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Started codebase quality, security, duplication, decomposition, and maintainability hardening pass.

entries.title: Complete codebase quality and security hardening pass
summary: Reviewed backend routes, services, repositories, schemas, frontend typed API boundary, OpenAPI contract, tests, and tooling.
Hardened admin token verification to use constant-time comparison (secrets.compare_digest) to remove a timing side-channel.
Extended the admin token regression test to cover prefix and longer-token rejection.
Confirmed SQL access is parameterized with whitelisted sort columns and validated locales, public endpoints restrict status to published/archived, and no runtime/cache/build artifacts are tracked.
checks: python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start frontend web foundation shell
summary: Started frontend web foundation shell implementation.
Adds app shell, navigation, locale switcher, shared UI states, route placeholders, and shared config.

entries.title: Complete frontend web foundation shell
summary: Added app shell (AppShell, AppHeader, AppNavigation, LocaleSwitcher) as server and client components.
Wrapped LocaleSwitcher in Suspense in AppHeader to satisfy Next.js 15 useSearchParams boundary requirement.
Added shared config (env.ts), locale helpers (locale.ts), route constants (routes.ts).
Added shared UI states: LoadingState, EmptyState, ErrorState.
Created route placeholder pages for /decision, /sources, /internal/data-quality.
Centralized API_BASE_URL in shared/config/env.ts; removed duplicate hardcoded constants from http.ts and lib/api.ts.
Upgraded /countries page to use shared typed API client and locale from searchParams.
Rewrote layout.tsx to use AppShell and page.tsx as clean home page.
Extended styles.css with full shell, nav, locale switcher, home page, and error state styles.
Added NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL to .env.example.
checks: python -m ruff check apps packages scripts tests --fix
python -m ruff format apps packages scripts tests
python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start country card and decision flow
summary: Started first real frontend user path: countries list → country card → decision run → ranked result.
Rewrites country/[slug]/page.tsx to use the new CountryReadModelResponse read-model structure.
Adds feature components for country card display and decision run form/results.
Implements /decision as client component with POST /api/v1/decision/run and ranked result UI.

entries.title: Complete country card and decision flow
summary: Rewrote /countries/[slug]/page.tsx using CountryReadModelResponse read-model; removed all stale card.data.item usage.

Created features/country-card/ with 9 typed components: CountryHeader, CountryProfileSections, CountryScores, ScoreBreakdown, CountryLegalSignals, CountrySources, CountryEvidenceSummary, CountryUserStoriesSummary, LocaleStatusBadge.
Rewrote /decision/page.tsx as client component; created features/decision-run/ with DecisionRunForm, DecisionResults, DecisionResultCard, DecisionBreakdown, DecisionSources, DecisionWarnings.
DecisionRunForm loads countries/scenarios via API, runs POST /api/v1/decision/run, renders ranked explainable results with strengths, weaknesses, risk warnings, breakdown, and sources.
Added resolveLocale helper to shared/lib/locale.ts and shared/lib/format.ts with formatDate, formatScore, formatWeight.
Updated /countries page: added EmptyState for empty list, iso2 display, improved error typing.
Extended styles.css with all new component classes.
No backend changes required; OpenAPI contract unchanged; generated types unchanged.
checks: python -m ruff check apps packages scripts tests --fix
python -m ruff format apps packages scripts tests
python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests

entries.title: Start legal signals, sources, and data quality pages
summary: Implements /legal-signals with country/type/direction/level filters and locale support.
Implements /sources with country/source_type/confidence filters and locale support.
Implements /internal/data-quality as server-rendered admin report page.

entries.title: Complete legal signals, sources, and data quality pages
summary: Created features/legal-signals/LegalSignalsView.tsx: client component with Suspense boundary, filter state (country/signal_type/impact_direction/impact_level), locale-aware API calls via legalSignalsApi, loading/error/empty states, signal cards with all fields.

Created features/sources/SourcesView.tsx: client component with Suspense boundary, filter state (country/source_type/confidence), sourcesApi calls, loading/error/empty states, source cards with external link, publisher, dates.

Created features/data-quality/DataQualityReportView.tsx: pure presentational server component rendering DataQualityReport summary (overall_status, critical_issues_count, warnings_count, checked_at) and issues list with per-severity left-border styling.
Rewrote app/legal-signals/page.tsx: server shell rendering LegalSignalsView; removed stale apiGet usage and local type definition.
Rewrote app/sources/page.tsx: server shell rendering SourcesView; replaced placeholder.

Rewrote app/internal/data-quality/page.tsx: async server component reading process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN (never NEXT_PUBLIC_), calling dataQualityApi.getDataQualityReport, rendering DataQualityReportView or ErrorState.
Extended styles.css with filterPageWrap, filterBar, filterGroup, filterLabel, filterSelect, clearButton, signalCard, sourceCard, sourceLink, dqWrap, dqSummaryCard, dqIssueCard, dqSeverity-* classes.
Admin token read server-side only via process.env.ADMIN_TOKEN; no secrets exposed to client.
checks: python -m mypy apps packages scripts tests
